betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Flow Control & Routing§f

§aControl the direction and distribution of fluids in your pipe network!§f

§6Check Valve§f (`pressure:check_valve`):
Allows fluid flow only from input to output side (arrow direction). §bNo redstone signal§f = flow enabled. §bRedstone signal§f = flow blocked. Can be rotated with a wrench. Compatible with FMP covers.

§6Pipe Sensor§f (`pressure:pipe_sensor`):
Emits a §bredstone signal§f when fluid is flowing through it. Has input and output sides (small arrows point to output). Fluid can only flow from input to output. Can be rotated with a wrench. Compatible with FMP covers.

§6High Pressure Router§f (`pressure:router`):
The ultimate fluid routing block. Has §b6 colored sides§f, each configurable as input/output or disabled. §bOutput priority§f: High/Medium/Low — fluid fills higher priority outputs first. §bInput modes§f: Active (pulls from tanks) or Passive (waits for push). Each side has independent §bredstone control§f and §bfilter settings§f. Connects to both pressure pipes and normal fluid pipes/tanks/machines.

§cWarning§f: Output-to-input loops without filtering will §4blow up§f.
